mainMenu.title: Choose a Game Mode
mainMenu.subtitle: Pick a mode below, or explore our interactive world map quiz.

physicalGeo.title: Physical Geography
physicalGeo.description: Locate mountains, rivers, deserts, seas and more in this interactive geography game!

flags.title: Flag Match
flags.description: The ultimate country flag matching game. Test your memory and speed!

shapeMatch.title: Cards Match
shapeMatch.description: Match Flags, Countries, Capitals, or Shapes on a fast-paced timer!

guessCountry.title: Guess the Country
guessCountry.description: Guess the hidden country using precise distance and direction hints.

bangOnline.title: Bang! Online
bangOnline.description: Play the legendary wild west card game directly in your browser.

language.title: Language
language.note: Language changes redirect to localized URLs.

nickname.title: Nickname
nickname.cooldownActive: Cooldown active - next change available in {{count}} day(s).
nickname.monthlyLimitReached: Monthly limit reached (2/2 used). Resets on the 1st of next month.
nickname.changesRemaining: {{count}} of 2 nickname changes remaining this month.
nickname.limitInfo: Limited to 2 changes per month, with a 7-day cooldown between changes.
nickname.usernameTitle: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
nickname.usernameHelp: 3-50 characters, letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens only

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.warning: This action cannot be undone. All your data including scores and progress will be permanently deleted.

messages.nicknameSame: Nickname is the same as your current one
messages.passwordRequiredForDelete: Please enter your password to confirm account deletion.

verification.emailNotVerified: Email not verified yet. Please check your inbox.
verification.title: 📧 Verify Your Email
verification.checkFailed: Failed to check verification status. Please try again.
verification.checkEmailBefore: Please verify your email before logging in. Check your inbox for the verification link.

errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
errors.passwordComplexity: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number

firebaseErrors.email-already-in-use: This email is already registered. Please log in instead.
firebaseErrors.invalid-email: Please enter a valid email address.
firebaseErrors.weak-password: Password is too weak. Please use at least 8 characters.
firebaseErrors.user-not-found: No account found with this email. Please sign up first.
firebaseErrors.invalid-credential: Invalid email or password. Please check and try again.
firebaseErrors.too-many-requests: Too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
firebaseErrors.user-disabled: This account has been disabled. Please contact support.
firebaseErrors.operation-not-allowed: This sign-in method is not enabled. Please contact support.
firebaseErrors.account-exists-with-different-credential: An account already exists with the same email but different sign-in method.
firebaseErrors.popup-closed-by-user: Sign-in popup was closed. Please try again.
firebaseErrors.popup-blocked: Pop-up was blocked by your browser. Please allow pop-ups and try again.
firebaseErrors.network-request-failed: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
firebaseErrors.resource-exhausted: Server is busy. Please try again in a few minutes.
firebaseErrors.quota-exceeded: Daily limit reached. Please try again tomorrow.
firebaseErrors.unavailable: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
firebaseErrors.permission-denied: Access denied. Please log in again.
firebaseErrors.duplicate-username: Username already in use. Please choose a different one.
firebaseErrors.no-user-signed-in: No user is currently signed in.
firebaseErrors.nickname-limit: You can only change your nickname 2 times per month. Try again next month.
firebaseErrors.nickname-cooldown: Please wait {{count}} more day(s) before changing your nickname again.
firebaseErrors.password-required: Password is required to delete your account.
firebaseErrors.default: An error occurred. Please try again.

messages.registrationSuccess: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account before logging in.

home.title: Country Flag Matching Game & World Map Quiz
home.description: Play the ultimate country flag matching game! Test your geography skills on our interactive world map quiz and climb the global leaderboards.

leaderboards.title: Flag Match & Map Quiz Leaderboards | World Quiz
leaderboards.description: See top scores for the flag match game, cards match, and guess country. Compare daily and all-time geography rankings.

map.title: Interactive World Map & Geography Game
map.description: Explore countries, capitals, and flags with our interactive geography game and world map. Perfect for fast learning and practice.

countries.title: Country Encyclopedia & Flags | World Quiz
countries.description: Browse country facts, world flags, capitals, languages, and neighbors in the ultimate World Quiz geography encyclopedia.

flagMatch.title: Play Country Flag Matching Game | World Quiz
flagMatch.description: Master the country flag matching game in world or region mode. Train your memory, learn world flags, and improve your speed.

shapeMatch.title: Cards Match Geography Game | World Quiz
shapeMatch.description: Match flags, countries, capitals, and country shapes against the clock in this fast-paced interactive geography game.

physicalGeo.title: Physical Geography Map Quiz | World Quiz
physicalGeo.description: Locate mountains, rivers, lakes, deserts, and seas in a fast-paced physical geography interactive map challenge.

guessCountry.title: Guess the Country Map Quiz | World Quiz
guessCountry.description: Find the hidden country in five attempts using precise distance, direction, and region hints on our interactive world map.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions | World Quiz
terms.description: Read the World Quiz terms and conditions, account rules, and fair-play requirements.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | World Quiz
privacy.description: Learn how World Quiz handles personal data, cookies, and account information.

auth.title: Sign In to World Quiz
auth.description: Sign in or create your World Quiz account to save scores and join global leaderboards.

setNickname.title: Set Your Nickname | World Quiz
setNickname.description: Choose your public World Quiz nickname for scores, rankings, and profile display.

settings.title: Account Settings | World Quiz
settings.description: Manage language, nickname, and profile settings for your World Quiz account.

notFound.title: Page Not Found | World Quiz
notFound.description: This page could not be found. Explore World Quiz games, interactive maps, and our country encyclopedia.

h1.mainMenu: Country Flag Matching Game & World Quiz

game.startHint: Start by tapping any country on the map

mapPanel.body: Hints unlock each round: continent/subregion first, then population/area, then direction and exact distance.
